# Meeting — {{Project name}} · {{date}}

> One page per meeting under Notion → project → Meetings. The human record. The requirement diff + grill are produced by `/meeting-intake` from the transcript (tldv).

**Attendees:** {{names}} · **Source:** {{tldv link / Slack thread}}

## Decisions

- {{decision}} — because {{reason}}.

## Requirement diff (R2R)

| Move   | Item                 | Notes                                    |
| ------ | -------------------- | ---------------------------------------- |
| Add    | {{new scope}}        | → new spec/PRD section                   |
| Change | {{refined/reversed}} | → spec diff (+ ADR if architectural)     |
| Remove | {{dropped}}          | → abandon spec, delete slice             |
| Reject | {{out of scope}}     | reason recorded so it doesn't creep back |

## Grill notes

- **Pre-mortem:** {{how it could fail}}
- **Success metric:** {{measurable signal}}
- **Edge cases:** {{…}}
- **Review rubric:** {{what a reviewer must verify}}
